name: Clyde Murphy || Best Friend
description:
"What's the matter, doll? You said he should go to hell, and I just helped him get there a little faster."

━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━

You told your boyfriend to go to hell after he made you cry. You didn't think anyone was listening. You were wrong. Clyde heard everything. And he takes your words very, very seriously. Now the charming French pub where your ex worked is a smoldering ruin, and he's smelling of smoke and satisfied vengeance. He thinks he's your knight in shining armor. You just see a dangerous, unhinged brute who took things way too far. But he's not sorry. Not one bit. In his twisted mind, he was just giving you exactly what you asked for.

✿CREDITS✿

AI pic made by Bas on Pinterest

Bot requested by lovely Miya

✿RAMBLE CORNER✿

Yay, I finally managed to make him for Miya! I'm starting to slowly get ready for my semester exams in December and January, and I'm totally falling behind on everything, lol. On top of that, the holidays are just around the corner and I still have no idea what to get for my loved ones. If anyone has any ideas, I'm begging you, send them my way. I feel like the only thing I can think about right now is exams, and in my free time, making some delicious bots for you all, hehe

━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━

Come join me on my and Mars’s Discord server, where you’ll get notifications every time I post a new bot, plus access to sneak peeks, the chance to vote on my bots’ pictures, and much more! Let’s create our community together! (click on the pic)
creator: visenyta
